creator: ru@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Jason K. Fritcher <jkf@wolfnet.org> reports that the problem 
was likely caused by a flaky hardware and has been fixed with 
a combination of setting the kern.timecounter.method to 1 and 
adding an 'options NTIMECOUNTER=10' to the kernel config.
